title: CombatSystem
body:
# CombatSystem

A lightweight and reliable PvP combat logging system for Minecraft servers.  
Designed to prevent unfair escapes and enforce real PvP consequences.

---

## ⚔️ Features

• Players automatically enter combat after hitting another player  
• Action bar displays a live, colored combat countdown  
• Sends chat messages when combat starts and ends  
• Logging out during combat results in instant death  
• Combat ends instantly if either player dies (killer or victim)  
• Blocks all commands during combat (except `/combat`)  
• Tells players exactly which command was blocked  
• Combat duration is fully configurable via `config.yml`  

---

## 🔧 Admin Tools

• `/combat reload` – Reloads the configuration file  
• Includes tab-completion for easy use  
• Requires `combat.reload` permission (default: OP only)

---

## 📁 Configuration

Simple config file:
```yaml
combat-time: 15
